creator: dave@dal.ca
text:
After consulting with the numba team, it appears that LD_LIBRARY_PATH requires to be set:
LD_LIBRARY_PATH=/usr/local/lib/gcc48
fixes the issue so that a user can just call `import numba` without invoking

import numpy
import numba 

but setting LD_LIBRARY_PATH isn't a preferred solution from what I gather. I will look for possible solutions, postpone the acceptance of this port until this is resolved, or you have a solution for me to add quickly.
